input.command:
COH="/Users/steven/Library/Application Support/LaunchCat/coh"
LOG="$COH/logs/launcher/launcher.log"
wc -c < "$LOG" | tr -d ' ' > /tmp/coh_log_offset.txt

echo "=== trigger via LaunchCat.app ==="
open -a "/Applications/LaunchCat.app"

# poll up to ~30s for the Homecoming window to appear
for i in $(seq 1 15); do
  sleep 2
  RES=$(osascript <<'AS' 2>/dev/null
tell application "System Events"
  repeat with p in (every process whose name is "wine64-preloader")
    try
      repeat with w in (windows of p)
        if (name of w as string) contains "Homecoming" then
          set {px, py} to position of w
          set {sw, sh} to size of w
          return "READY pos=" & px & "," & py & " size=" & sw & "x" & sh
        end if
      end repeat
    end try
  end repeat
  return "waiting"
end tell
AS
)
  echo "t=$((i*2))s: $RES"
  if echo "$RES" | grep -q READY; then break; fi
done
echo
echo "launcher.exe: $(ps aux | grep -iE 'launcher\.exe' | grep -v grep | awk '{print "pid="$2" cpu="$3"%"}' || echo gone)"
input.description: Re-trigger LaunchCat and wait for launcher window
